title: MapReduce server-level configuration
description: The server directory is responsible for managing the server-level configuration of the Hadoop MapReduce architecture. It contains two subdirectories, jobtracker and tasktracker, which handle the server-level configuration for the JobTracker and TaskTracker components, respectively. The server directory does not contain any core logic, inputs/outputs, or dependencies. Instead, it provides a centralized location for storing and managing the server-level configuration for the entire Hadoop MapReduce system.

raw_response:
TITLE: MapReduce server-level configuration

DESCRIPTION:
The server directory is responsible for managing the server-level configuration of the Hadoop MapReduce architecture. It contains two subdirectories, jobtracker and tasktracker, which handle the server-level configuration for the JobTracker and TaskTracker components, respectively. The server directory does not contain any core logic, inputs/outputs, or dependencies. Instead, it provides a centralized location for storing and managing the server-level configuration for the entire Hadoop MapReduce system.
